raw_consumer_statement:
My American Express Credit Card has been charged by XXXX XXXX on 8 occasions for a total of {$810.00} spanning from XX/XX/XXXX to XX/XX/XXXX. I have twice requested that both American Express reject the charges and that XXXX refund these charges. Neither have done so. 

XXXX sent receipts to Amex and then Amex provided those to me. What is shown in the receipts is the charges from an account that is registered to an email address that is not mine. Regardless of this fact, neither company will reverse the charges. In addition, XXXX will not remove that credit card from the account in question that I do not have access to. 

These charges are fraudulent. Neither company will recognize this. I continue to accrue charges every month that this case remains open. 

Attached are the amex charges and 4 of the receipts ( provided the first time I made a request ) that show the account with an email address that is not mine.
